name: it-validate
description: Iterate the SOW/service design/runbook until structure, readiness verdicts, and claim substantiation are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. checklist-coverage: each readiness gate heading needs a non-empty Verdict line before the next heading — add the verdict, do not delete the gate. claim-substantiation: every percentage or superlative/absolute claim needs a [^id] citation or an inline (source: …) on the same line — source it or soften the claim. Edit only the deliverable file.
guardrails: Never fabricate a source to satisfy claim-substantiation — if an SLA number has no basis, the number must change or be removed, not the citation faked.
Never delete a readiness gate to clear checklist-coverage; write an honest Verdict for it.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section, including Rollback.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the deliverable cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., an SLA target genuinely has no agreed basis). Recommend human review.
